ops.body:
Release-notes items accumulated from Phase 2 review (include in the tag's notes):

1. BREAKING: `workflows install --dir` renamed to `--dest` (planned; `mcp --dir` unchanged).
2. BREAKING (edge): mutually-exclusive flag pairs now use cobra flag groups keyed on "flag was set", so degenerate invocations like `task add --branch main --backlog=false` or `note expire ID --clear --reason ""` now exit 2 with the exclusion named (previously value-checked and allowed).
3. Semantic: flag value `-` now reads stdin uniformly everywhere free text is accepted (e.g. `log append --entry -`; previously a literal dash via the flag path).
4. Semantic: `note/doc/log search --limit 0` now means "all results" (uniform bindLimit; previously returned nothing).
5. Mount mode flags became subcommands: `mount list|stop|shutdown`.
6. From Phase 1: older binaries reading anchor-edited/deleted runbook chains or noted criteria fail that entity's fold with a kind-mismatch upgrade hint; creation-time anchors/notes are silently invisible to older binaries. Fleet heals on next workflow run.
